title: griffithianthus merrillii
intro: Griffithianthus merrillii is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae, native to the Philippines. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Griffithianthus merrillii is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Griffithianthus merrillii typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various ailments.
